extends.title: Extends
extends.description: Parent config files to inherit from (later entries override earlier).

projectDir.title: Project directory
projectDir.description: Project directory relative to the config file.

skipRenderBoard.title: Skip board preview
skipRenderBoard.description: Skip rendering the board preview image.

autoInstall.title: Auto-install flatmaxxing skill
autoInstall.description: Install the flatmaxxing agent skill on `flatmaxx init` and offer it on `flatmaxx doctor`.

file.title: Board file
file.description: Path to the KiCad board file (auto-detected if unset).

anyOf.title: Board side
anyOf.description: Which copper side of the board: "front" or "back".

ignoreSide.title: Ignored side
ignoreSide.description: Skip processing one side of the board.

distance.title: Spacing
distance.description: Inset of alignment drills from the board edges (mm).

alignmentDrills.title: Alignment drills
alignmentDrills.description: Registration drill holes for double-sided alignment.

generateEdgeCutsWithAlignmentDrills.title: Edge cuts with alignment drills
generateEdgeCutsWithAlignmentDrills.description: Generate edge cuts together with alignment drills.

left.title: Left edge
left.description: Offset added to the left edge (mm).

right.title: Right edge
right.description: Offset added to the right edge (mm).

top.title: Top edge
top.description: Offset added to the top edge (mm).

bottom.title: Bottom edge
bottom.description: Offset added to the bottom edge (mm).

additionalDistance.title: Additional distance
additionalDistance.description: Extra board outline offset per edge for plating (mm).

cornerRadius.title: Corner radius
cornerRadius.description: Corner radius of the plating outline (mm).

waterMl.title: Bath water
waterMl.description: Volume of water in the bath (mL).

maxBoardWidthMm.title: Max board width
maxBoardWidthMm.description: Maximum board width that fits the bath (mm).

maxBoardHeightMm.title: Max board height
maxBoardHeightMm.description: Maximum board height that fits the bath (mm).

allowRotation.title: Allow rotation
allowRotation.description: Allow rotating the board to fit the bath.

solutionConcentrationPercent.title: Solution concentration
solutionConcentrationPercent.description: Concentration of the HCl stock solution (%).

referenceConcentrationPercent.title: Reference concentration
referenceConcentrationPercent.description: Reference concentration the dose is calibrated against (%).

referenceMillilitersPerLiter.title: Reference dose
referenceMillilitersPerLiter.description: Reference dose at the reference concentration (mL/L).

recipe.title: Recipe
recipe.description: Copper electroplating recipe and bath chemistry.

generate.title: Generate
generate.description: Whether the solder mask is generated.

excludeSides.title: Exclude sides
excludeSides.description: Sides to exclude from the solder mask.

items.title: Board side
items.description: Which copper side of the board: "front" or "back".

device.title: Device
device.description: xTool laser device used for solder mask.

xtool.title: xTool
xtool.description: xTool exposure settings for solder mask.

excludeSides.title: Exclude sides
excludeSides.description: Sides to exclude from the stencil.

items.title: Board side
items.description: Which copper side of the board: "front" or "back".

device.title: Device
device.description: xTool device used to cut the stencil.

xtool.title: xTool
xtool.description: xTool cutting settings for the stencil.

withEdgeCuts.title: With edge cuts
withEdgeCuts.description: Include edge cuts in the drill output.

millZCutDepth.title: Mill Z cut depth
millZCutDepth.description: Per-pass cut depth when using a mill (mm).

travelZ.title: Travel Z
travelZ.description: Z height for rapid travel moves (mm).

endZ.title: End Z
endZ.description: Z height at the end of the job (mm).

mirrorAxis.title: Mirror axis
mirrorAxis.description: Axis to mirror across for backside jobs (X or Y).

matchToleranceMm.title: Match tolerance
matchToleranceMm.description: Tolerance when matching holes to drill tools (mm).

availableDrills.title: Available drills
availableDrills.description: Drill tools available to the machine.

availableMills.title: Available mills
availableMills.description: Mill tools available to the machine.

appPath.title: App path
appPath.description: Path to the xTool Studio application.

cdpHost.title: CDP host
cdpHost.description: Chrome DevTools Protocol host for xTool Studio.

cdpPort.title: CDP port
cdpPort.description: Chrome DevTools Protocol port for xTool Studio.

existingProcess.title: Existing process
existingProcess.description: Behaviour when xTool Studio is already running ("prompt" asks).

tabsPerContour.title: Tabs per contour
tabsPerContour.description: Number of holding tabs generated per contour.

existingProcess.title: Existing process
existingProcess.description: Behaviour when MakeraCAM is already running ("prompt" asks).

finalCut.title: Final cut
finalCut.description: Generate the final contour CNC step.

xtoolPercent.title: xTool percent
xtoolPercent.description: Valid range for xTool percentage values (%).

xtoolPasses.title: xTool passes
xtoolPasses.description: Valid range for xTool pass counts.

electroplatingBoardSizeMm.title: Electroplating board size (mm)
electroplatingBoardSizeMm.description: Valid range for plated board dimensions (mm).

electroplatingMicrons.title: Electroplating copper thickness
electroplatingMicrons.description: Valid range for deposited copper thickness (µm).

ranges.title: Ranges
ranges.description: Acceptable value ranges used during validation.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the isolation feasibility check runs.

ignore.title: Ignore
ignore.description: Regular expressions for nets to ignore.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the drill feasibility check runs.

title: flatmaxx configuration
description: Schema for flatmaxxing.toml, the flatmaxx project configuration file.
